{{Infobox location
| name = Midnight Fields
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Midnight Fields]] are located in [[Asphodel]] and contain flowers that can paralyze, induce sleep, or kill.}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
